assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures OpenIdConnectEvents on the OIDC handler
Program.cs sets OnRedirectToIdentityProvider to add AcrValues = 'tenant:myorg' to the ProtocolMessage
assertions.rationale: The response uses SetParameter("acr_values", "tenant:myorg") which achieves the same result.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets OnRemoteFailure to call context.HandleResponse() and redirect to /auth-error
assertions.rationale: The response includes HandleResponse() and Redirect("/auth-error") in OnRemoteFailure.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs passes login_hint via context.ProtocolMessage.LoginHint or SetParameter in the OnRedirectToIdentityProvider event
assertions.rationale: The response uses SetParameter("login_hint", ...) which is acceptable.
